zh.lifeSummary: 當Urraca Nunes Velho於1142年出生在葡萄牙時，她的父親Nunes Fernandes33歲，母親Elvira Toures27歲。她和Señor Gomez Paez De Silva至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1203年在葡萄牙波爾塔利格彭特 德 索爾彭特 德 索爾 特拉馬加 E 瓦爾 德 阿c享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Nunes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Mario, Alberto, Domingos, Ricardo, Americo, Ana, Armando.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Guilherme, Aderito, Fernandes, Ilidio, Vasco, Zulmira.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name   Nuno  .

Jewish (Sephardic): Portuguese surname (see 1 above), adopted at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Nuno
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Salvador, Alfredo, Carlos, Francisco, JoseLuis, Miguel, Luis, Manuel, Alfonso.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo.
Spanish (Nuño), Portuguese, and Galician: from a medieval personal name, first attested in the Latin form Nunnus, of uncertain derivation.

en.lifeSummary: When Urraca Nunes Velho was born in 1142, in Portugal, her father, Nunes Fernandes, was 33 and her mother, Elvira Toures, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Señor Gomez Paez De Silva. She died in 1203, in Ponte de Sor Tramaga e Vale de Açor, Ponte de Sor, Portalegre, Portugal, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Urraca Nunes Velho est née en 1142, à Portugal, son père, Nunes Fernandes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elvira Toures, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Señor Gomez Paez De Silva. Elle est décédée en 1203, à Ponte de Sor Tramaga e Vale de Açor, Ponte de Sor, Portalegre, Portugal, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Urraca Nunes Velho 1142 in Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nunes Fernandes 33 und ihre Mutter Elvira Toures 27. Sie hatte mit Señor Gomez Paez De Silva mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1203 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Ponte de Sor Tramaga e Vale de Açor, Ponte de Sor, Portalegre, Portugal.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Urraca Nunes Velho è nata il nel 1142 nel Portogallo, sua padre, Nunes Fernandes, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elvira Toures, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Señor Gomez Paez De Silva. Morì nel 1203, nel Ponte de Sor Tramaga e Vale de Açor, Ponte de Sor, Portalegre, Portogallo, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Urraca Nunes Velhoが1142年にポルトガルで生まれた時，父Nunes Fernandesは33歳，母Elvira Touresは27歳であった。彼女はSeñor Gomez Paez De Silvaとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1203年にポルトガルポルタレグアポント ド ソルポント ド ソル トラマガ  ベル ド アcオルで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Urraca Nunes Velho(이)가 1142년 포르투갈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nunes Fernandes(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elvira Toures(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Señor Gomez Paez De Silva(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1203년 포르투갈 포탤그르 폰트 데 소르 폰트 데 소르 트램아가  발 데 아c어에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Urraca Nunes Velho родилась в 1142 г. в местности Португалия, её отцу по имени Nunes Fernandes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elvira Toures, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Señor Gomez Paez De Silva. Она умерла в 1203 г. в местности понт де сор трамага э веил де аcор, понт де сор, портеилегр, Португалия в возрасте 61 год.
